plot outline: In the extremely popular video game, Free City, a NPC named Guy learns the true nature of his existence when he meets the girl of his dreams, a human player. This player's interactions with Guy has massive affects on him, the game, and real world as they play it.
title: Free Guy
akas: ขอสักทีพี่จะเป็นฮีโร่ (Thailand, English title)
Free Guy. Tomando el control (Costa Rica)
